title: quercus × hispanica var. diversifolia
intro: Quercus × hispanica var. diversifolia, also known as the Spanish oak or Diversifolium, is a hybrid variety of the Quercus ilex species, a type of evergreen oak tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Quercus × hispanica var. diversifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antioxidant, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce the risk of heart disease, and exhibit anti-diabetic properties. Quercus × hispanica var. diversifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
